rules_text: To heal is the way of the Elves that venture from the Court. Gladly are their gifts accepted, even in battle.

name: Juggernaut
rules_text: Nomadic, Mountainwalk. Neutral. Cannot be targeted by Unmaking spells. When Juggernaut moves, its new square has all spells dispelled, and becomes barren land. ("Moves" effects happen before any "enters square" effects.)

name: Master Fletcher
rules_text: Archer ignores opponent's armor because it was created in a structure with Master Fletcher.

name: Stronghold
rules_text: Since our banishment from the plains, the mountains have become our place of refuge. ­- King Beobogh, in the final year of his reign

name: Trebuchet
rules_text: These siege engines convert the pull of gravity to drive their arms forward, heaving massive stones at city walls. Yet Dwarves will build these inside their own walls, facing outward. And theirs are larger than yours, because they do not need to move.

name: Narh'u'ha
rules_text: Narh'u'ha is a neutral archer. Cannot join groups or add recruits. Any individual spell targeted on Narh'u'ha is squandered, and a random spell of same total mana cost is added to the top of caster's deck, altered to caster's house and mana types. Only one in play at a time.

name: Back to Nature
rules_text: "Goldleaf's treachery, however vile, shall not mark the fall of Nature! Come, loyal nymphs and playful dryads! Come, towering folk of the woods and courageous dwellers of the forest! Flourish throughout the land and restore this vile, sad world to her previous glory!" -- Acornbelly, to the denizens of Nature

name: Icecaps
rules_text: Nomadic. Neutral. When Icecaps' group dies, group's square becomes ice. Icecaps attack all groups, even if friendly. (When group enters ice, group slides in its direction of travel to the first non-ice square, or the first square that blocks movement. A sliding group ignores other groups in all squares except the last square, and all spells in squares except the first ice square and the last square. Flight does not prevent sliding.)

name: Uproot
rules_text: Nomadic. When Uprooted group dies, group's square becomes forest.

name: Devolution
rules_text: The Great Wasting still has its effects today. Centuries later it can still be found to create new Misfits.

name: Hollow Jester
rules_text: Hollow Jester is a swordsman. Group cannot add any new recruits. At start of turn, a random other recruit in group gets Chaos Feature. On expiration, Hollow Jester is removed from the game. (This does not trigger any death effects.)

name: Runts
rules_text: Swordsman gets -1 hand damage and -2 maximum hit points because it was created in a structure with Runts.

name: Rust
rules_text: Within the waste, many things rust, and armor is affected. A wise warrior brings a good supply of towels.

name: Firewyrm
rules_text: Firewalk. Two attacks. Before combat, Firewyrm appears in lava or barren land adjacent to a non-friendly group, and its square becomes lava. After all combat, it disappears again. Dispelled when killed.

name: War Drums
rules_text: "Sound the Drums of War after battle. They represent our hearts which will beat proudly for one more day. Sound the Drums of War after battle. They remind us of the hearts of our fallen comrades, which lie still now and forever. Sound the Drums of War after battle. We shall fight again." -- Human soldiers' chant

name: Civil Unrest
rules_text: Cast on globe. Every non-friendly town and colony no longer gene- rates its 1 mana unless it is occupied at start of turn by N or more recruits, where N is the number of friendly copies of this spell on the globe. (Mana-generating spells still produce mana normally.) May be cast more than once.

name: Crucible
rules_text: Cast on globe. After start of next turn, all Imps in lava or volcano squares are fully healed, and take no damage from lava or volcanoes, and Crucible is dispelled.

name: Maloch's Pact
rules_text: Caster gets -2 Will and -2 Strife each turn for having cast Maloch's Pact. May be cast more than once.

name: Perverse Speed
rules_text: Cast on friendly recruit group. All members of group get -3 maximum hit points and +1 attack rate.

name: Slavers
rules_text: H:0/M:0 A:0 L:0. 0 attacks. Group joins caster's side. Can't join groups or add new recruits. After start of turn, if group is in structure, group is replaced by an equal number of novices, if structure is friendly, or Enslaved is dispelled if structure is non-friendly. (This does not trigger any death effects.) At start of combat, group withdraws, ending combat, and Enslaved is dispelled.

name: Song of the Doomed
rules_text: Cast on globe. If any minion dies during the rest of this turn, or from next turn's "at start of turn" and "after start of turn" effects, caster gets +1 Will permanently.

name: Wild Abandon
rules_text: Cast on globe. Both players discard all spells in hand that were not cast this turn.

name: Willing Supplicants
rules_text: Cast on town or colony. If structure is occupied by two or more recruits, Willing Supplicants generates +1 Will and +1 Strife for structure owner each turn.

name: Carnivorous Plant
rules_text: Immobile. Gets +H hand damage, where H is its current hit points. Gets -5 hand damage if its owner has Initiative. Withdraws at the start of combat round 4. (Immobile monsters cannot be moved.)

name: Jungle
rules_text: Monster gets +3 maximum and current hit points because it was created in a square with Jungle.

name: Korgian Loincloth
rules_text: Cast on recruit. Recruit gets +1 armor and +1 level.

name: Mountaindancer
rules_text: Cast on swordsman. Swordsman gets +1 hand damage, and its group gains Mountainwalk. (Group may cross mountains and volcanoes. This does not protect group from volcano damage.)

name: Oro and Vlad
rules_text: Oro is a Hero swordsman. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)

name: Outcast
rules_text: When a Cyclops commits an act against his tribe, he is forced to atone by committing an equal or better deed of heroism. Only then can he return in good standing.

name: Seedbearers
rules_text:
In the first Cycle,
Sister Tree is small.
In the second Cycle,
Sister Tree grows strong.
In the third Cycle,
Sister Tree shelters us.
-- Cyclops proverb

name: Animus of World
rules_text: The farther you walk, the harder it is to take another step.

name: Dehydration
rules_text: Stealth can only get you so far, when the sands of Death stretch out for as far as you can see.

name: Famine
rules_text: Cast on globe. At start of turn, one random non-desert square becomes desert. (Desert causes 1 hit point of damage after start of turn unless group has Desertwalk.) Duration: Through turn of casting +4. May be cast more than once.

name: Garrote of Bes-Kandra
rules_text: Cast on swordsman. Swordsman attacks normally in combat round 1, and gets +3 hand damage in combat round 1 only.

name: Harm Monster
rules_text: Cast on monster group. Each member of group is lowered to 1 current hit point.

name: Keeper Code
rules_text: H:2 A:1 HP:7 L:1 Cast on globe. Each time a non-friendly recruit dies outside of combat, one Keeper swordsman is created in caster's Sanctum. (If the recruit cannot be created this turn, it is lost.) Only one per player at a time.

name: Slave Labor
rules_text: Caster gets +1 Mystery and +1 Will each turn for having cast Slave Labor. May be cast more than once.

name: Terrifying Mystery
rules_text: Fear feeds on itself.

name: Waste Not
rules_text: waste land.

name: Comrades in Dolor
rules_text: Cast on globe. At start of turn, one random enemy recruit changes into a Shadow. Shadows receive no combat damage from Shadows (before checking armor). Duration: Through turn of casting +3. Only one per player at a time.

name: Lethargy
rules_text: Cast on globe. All recruits get -1 level.

name: Nightmare
rules_text: Nomadic. At start of combat against recruits, Nightmare casts Despond (all members of group receive +1 damage from Shadows; Visions receive +2 damage instead) on opposing group.

name: Nihil's Touch
rules_text: And when the hourglass has run out, the hourglass of temporality, when the noise of secular life has grown silent and its restless or ineffectual activism has come to an end, when everything around you is still ... then eternity asks you and every individual in these millions and millions about only one thing: whether you have lived in despair or not ... -- Søren Kierkegaard, "The Sickness Unto Death"

name: Odar
rules_text: Odar is a Hero swordsman. In combat, whenever Odar is idle, he must attack a random other minion on either side. When Odar is alone in his group, his group joins caster's side, and becomes player-controlled. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)

name: Panic
rules_text: Cast on globe. Every player-controlled group in every town and colony moves in a random legal direction.

name: Pantogar's Failure
rules_text: Cast on recruit. Recruit changes into a Shadow. Each turn, every spell in opponent's hand that has opponent's primary mana in its casting cost is adjusted by +1 primary mana of opponent's mana types.

name: Passing in the Night
rules_text: Cast on globe. On turn of casting +1, neither player may cast any spell, nor discard, and no group enters combat. (This prevents all start-of-combat effects as well.) Duration: Through turn of casting +1.

name: Abstention
rules_text: Caster gets +2 Clarity each turn for having cast Abstention. May be cast more than once.

name: Aurora
rules_text: Recruit gets +1 armor. Dispelled when recruit is hit in combat.

name: Charmed Existence
rules_text: Cast on recruit. Recruit dodges the first attack each round that would normally hit recruit.

name: Heartsong
rules_text: Heartsong is a Hero swordsman. At start of combat against a recruit group of one, if both groups can join, then enemy recruit leaves its group, has all group spells dispelled, and joins Heartsong's group, ending combat. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)

name: Master Armorer
rules_text: Recruit gets +1 armor because it was created in a structure with Master Armorer.

name: Recall
rules_text: Cast on friendly recruit group. Group is removed from the game. (This does not trigger any death effects.) For each recruit in group, 1 novice is created in caster's Sanctum.

name: Spiritual Advisers
rules_text: M:2 A:0 HP:7 L:1 Cast on globe. One Vision archer is created in every recruit group on the board. (Recruit groups off the board are not affected.)

name: Zana's Escape
rules_text: Cast on globe. When any friendly recruit is dying, recruit returns to life, is fully healed, has all group spells dispelled, and disappears, and Zana's Escape is dispelled. At start of next turn (or the earliest turn thereafter), recruit's new group reappears in a random friendly unoccupied structure, or in caster's Sanctum if it is unoccupied and no friendly unoccupied structures exist. Only one per player at a time.

name: Breaking the Chains
rules_text: When Dracha appoints a subordinate with a task, he will remove obstacles to that task's completion.

name: Granite Guardian
rules_text: Before combat, Granite Guardian appears adjacent to a non-friendly recruit group that is adjacent to a friendly town. After all combat, it disappears again. Dispelled when killed.

name: Ozande
rules_text: Ozande is a Hero swordsman. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)

name: Preservation
rules_text: Caster gets +1 Order and +1 Mystery each turn for having cast Preservation. May be cast more than once.

name: Road Building
rules_text: Dracha insists those who walk the straight path have nothing to fear.

name: Rule by Example
rules_text: Cast on globe. On turn of casting +1, caster cannot cast any spells. On turn of casting +2 and +3, opponent cannot cast any spells. Duration: Through turn of casting +3.

name: Summoning Licensure
rules_text: Cast on globe. The next summoning spell cast is squandered, and Summoning Licensure is dispelled.

name: Trump
rules_text: Cast on globe. Dispels the most recent alteration or conjuration that was cast from either player's hand.

name: Adriel's Promise
rules_text: Adriel, Elven Protectress of Life, vowed that as long as she lived, the Dwarves would not go extinct from infertility.

name: Court Politics
rules_text: Caster gets +2 Clarity each turn for having cast Court Politics. May be cast more than once.

name: Day of Mourning
rules_text:
From vain pursuit our Lord returned
His own Protector oaths betrayed
And ordered all then to lament
Upon a dire cost thrice paid
-- The Fae Quadrille of Wyr

name: Faerie Glade
rules_text: Cast on square. Square becomes forest. (Minions in forest are con- cealed. Concealed minions cannot be targeted by enemy individual spells.) Affects all contiguous forest squares. Enemy recruits in squares get -1 level. May be cast more than once (but is non-cumulative).

name: Greater Clarity
rules_text: The product of knowledge is more knowledge.

name: Spy at Court
rules_text: Cast on town or colony. At start of turn, Spy at Court tells its caster the next card at the top of its caster's deck (after caster has drawn cards this turn), if structure is friendly; or the top card in opponent's deck (before opponent draws cards this turn), if the structure is enemy.  Each additional Spy at Court in play tells the next successive card. Only one per player per structure at a time.

name: Standoff
rules_text: Cast on globe. All recruit groups' movement orders are cancelled, and they cannot be moved. Duration: Through turn of casting +1.

name: Strategic Withdrawals
rules_text: Cast on globe. All groups withdraw at the start of combat round 7, ending combat.

name: Appeal to Hope
rules_text: Immobile.

name: Boret'hu's Influence
rules_text: The Dwarven Historian Boret'hu chronicled the events from just before the Great Wasting to present day. His works are proof that the present can be influenced by the past.

name: Dwarven Airship
rules_text: Cast on friendly group. Group gains Flight. (Group may cross any terrain, and is immune to adverse terrain effects.) When group moves into a structure, duration is reset to current turn +9. On expiration, group dies. Duration: Through turn of casting +9.

name: Field Armorer
rules_text: Recruit gets +1 armor from a Field Armorer.

name: Natural Defenses
rules_text: Cast on square adjacent to friendly structure. Square become mountain. (Mountain blocks movement unless group has Mountainwalk.)

name: Pinnacle of Order
rules_text: Sufficiently ordered systems improve themselves.

name: Quantum Mechanic
rules_text: The Okapi Guild specializes in exploiting Fingle's Last Law of Probability: that which is inevitable, happens; that which is unlikely, happens when you don't want it to.

name: Theralda Glaivesforge
rules_text: Theralda Glaivesforge is a Hero swordswoman. While Theralda is in play, every non-Making spell in her caster's hand that has Order or Will in its casting cost is adjusted by -1 primary and -1 secondary mana of its mana types. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)

name: Alchemy
rules_text: Cast on globe. Caster gets +2 Will and -1 Clarity on odd-numbered turns, or -1 Will and +2 Clarity on even-numbered turns. May be cast more than once.

name: Force of Mind
rules_text: Cast on globe. If the top card of opponent's deck is Force of Mind, one copy of Force of Mind is added to the top of opponent's deck. Otherwise, two copies of Force of Mind are added to the top of opponent's deck.

name: Meditation
rules_text: Cast on group. On turn of casting only, group's movement orders are cancelled, and it cannot be moved. All members of group get +1 level.

name: Octagon of Force
rules_text: Cast on square. When recruit group enters square, group gets Binding Cube (group cannot be moved through current turn +2).

name: Pantogar's Dream
rules_text: Pantogar, Djinni enthusiast of Justice, attempted to write a Book of Law. Had he succeeded

name: Dint of Will
rules_text: Intense concentration makes it easier to concentrate.

name: Sar'uli Muzzle
rules_text: Cast on minion with hand attacks. Minion gets -5 hand damage.

name: Xenological Study
rules_text: Caster gets +2 Will each turn for having cast Xenological Study. May be cast more than once.

name: Eagle Eyes
rules_text: Cast on friendly recruit. Recruit cannot be targeted by non-friendly individual spells. All friendly archers in squares adjacent to recruit get +1 missile damage.

name: Hailstorm
rules_text: Cast on square. Affects square and all adjacent squares. At start of turn, all minions in affected squares take 1 hit point of damage. Duration: Through turn of casting +2. May be cast more than once.

name: Overflow
rules_text:
What is running, never walking?
Has a mouth that isn't talking?
Has a head that's never weeping?
Has a bed where it's not sleeping?
-- Riddle of the Nix

name: Smell the Roses
rules_text: Cast on recruit group. Group becomes computer-controlled, cannot join groups or create new recruits, and moves like a territorial monster within the 3x3 diamond centered on group's square at time of casting. Duration: Through turn of casting +2.

name: Unseelie Howl
rules_text: Cast on recruit group. If group is player-controlled, its movement orders are cancelled. Every friendly recruit group's movement orders are cancelled.  (Groups may still move if forced, or if they are computer- controlled.)

name: Utaban Brothers
rules_text: The denizens of Nature have many friends. The Foxpeople of Utabo can be called upon to look after the forests in times of need, allowing more Satyrs to defend the groves.

name: Water's Gift
rules_text: Cast on friendly town or colony. The four squares adjacent to structure become ice. (When group enters ice, group slides in its direction of travel to the first non-ice square, or the first square that blocks movement. Flight does not prevent sliding.)

name: Watersniper
rules_text: Cast on archer. Archer gets +1 missile damage, and its group gains Waterwalk. (Group may cross water, and does not drown in water.)

name: Destroy Creation
rules_text: Caster gets -1 World each turn for having cast Destroy Creation. May be cast more than once.

name: Fizzle
rules_text: Cast on globe. Dispels a random spell on the globe.

name: Horsing Around
rules_text: Cast on friendly recruit group. Group moves twice this turn in its direction of travel. If group is player- controlled, it moves in a random legal direction toward an unoccupied square.

name: Jester at Court
rules_text: Cast on town or colony. At start of turn, Jester at Court tells both players a random card that isn't on top of structure owner's deck. (Start of turn effects happen before card draws.) Only one per player per structure at a time.

name: Mitosis
rules_text: Cast on friendly recruit group of two or less. For each Misfit in group, Mitosis creates another Misfit of the same class. All Misfits in group with 6 or more current hit points are lowered to 5 current hit points. (Misfits with less than 5 current hit points are not healed.)

name: Mudslinging
rules_text: Cast on square in a contiguous region of three or more squares with the same terrain type. One random square within that region becomes swamp. (Group in swamp can exit only in the direction from which any group most recently entered that swamp.)

name: ThudThud
rules_text: ThudThud is a Hero archer. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)

name: ThudThud's Journey
rules_text: Cast on recruit. Recruit gets three Chaos Features and changes into a Misfit.

name: Unstable Magick
rules_text: Cast on globe. On each turn thereafter, one random spell cast by either player is squandered.

name: Book of War
rules_text: Never stop learning. -- Ngozi, The Book of War, last sentence

name: Cannon
rules_text: Cast on globe. At start of combat, if friendly group has at least one Human archer, Cannon inflicts 1 hit point of damage on each member of opposing group. Only one per player at a time.

name: Challenge
rules_text: Know strategy. Know tactics. But above all, know how to fight. -- Ngozi, The Book of War

name: Decoy
rules_text: Decoy is a swordsman. Decoy gets +2 armor. Decoy does not attack, nor deal hand or missile damage. In combat, all enemy shooters (minions with missile attacks), and all unpaired enemy bashers (minions with only hand attacks), must attack Decoy. Only one in a group.

name: Defensive Pact
rules_text: When Lord Auberol invited a Human band to encamp within Arboria to defend against Bes-Kandra's legions, he had no idea that he would have to cede those lands to the Humans permanently.

name: General
rules_text: Cast on friendly recruit. Recruit cannot be targeted by non-friendly individual spells. All friendly swordsmen in squares adjacent to recruit get +1 hand damage.

name: Growing Strife
rules_text: Strife feeds upon itself and grows stronger for it.

name: Vlad and Oro
rules_text: Vlad Hrothgar is a Hero swordsman. (Each Hero may be cast only once per game.)

name: Colony
rules_text: When this spell expires, or is dispelled, the colony is destroyed.
